entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: A region in Mali where the simulation framework was applied to a representative village.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographical region where rural livelihoods are being assessed.

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC AND BIOPHYSICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Future trends that influence changes in rural livelihoods.

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The objective of identifying and directing effective efforts to improve livelihoods.

entities.name: FARMER PRACTICES
entities.description: Hypothetical changes in agricultural methods used by farmers.

entities.name: POLICY INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Strategic actions and programs designed to improve food self-sufficiency and income.

entities.name: SIMULATION FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A tool developed to assess food self-sufficiency and income per capita for households.

entities.name: FOOD SELF-SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The capacity of a household to produce enough food to meet its own needs.

entities.name: INCOME PER CAPITA
entities.description: The average income per person within a household.

entities.name: BUSINESS AS USUAL
entities.description: A scenario where current trends continue without significant policy intervention.

entities.name: DAIRY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A scenario focusing on the intensification of livestock and milk production.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION
entities.description: The activity of raising animals for agricultural output.

entities.name: MILK SECTOR
entities.description: The economic sector focused on milk production and support.

entities.name: FAMILY PLANNING
entities.description: A policy intervention aimed at managing household size to improve food security.

entities.name: JOB CREATION
entities.description: A policy intervention aimed at creating employment opportunities outside of agriculture.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A sustainable method of managing pests to increase crop productivity.

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of small-scale machinery to enhance agricultural productivity.

entities.name: MINERAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: The use of inorganic fertilizers to increase crop yields.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL CEREALS
entities.description: The primary crops grown by smallholder farmers in the study area.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, which can be increased through specific interventions.

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being below the poverty line, which the study aims to alleviate.
